summary: Frontend testing of GO pillar feature parity. All 10 key features tested with logged-in user (dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 / Mojo as active pet). Core functionality works correctly. Two medium issues identified around loading performance.

minor.issue: Intermittent 500 when breed param is included without lat/lng coordinates. Returns 200 when coordinates are provided or when no breed param. Seen in backend logs line 895.

Very slow response (~14+ seconds) when AI scoring is triggered. The MiraPicksSection Promise.all waits for both product and service picks - product picks block on LiteLLM scoring calls. Causes MiraPicksSection to appear blank for 14+ seconds.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal shows loading spinner for ~5-8 seconds on each open. Root cause: `allergies = useMemo(() => getPetAllergies(pet), [pet])` creates new array reference when `pet` reference changes (from background scoring events updating petData in GoSoulPage). This triggers `useEffect([isOpen, category, allergies, size, condition, apiUrl])` repeatedly, calling `setLoading(true)` each time. Fix: Change useEffect deps to use `pet?.id` instead of `allergies` object reference, or compute allergies inside the effect.

Section shows only header text ('Mira's Go Picks for Mojo AI Scored') with completely blank content area for 14+ seconds during initial page load. No loading indicator is shown, creating a jarring blank space. Root cause: claude-picks product API takes ~14+ seconds (AI scoring LiteLLM calls). While loading=true and picks=[], showImagines=false, so nothing renders.
Soul score shows '—%' initially (before API returns liveScore). This is expected behavior but shows 'Loading Mojo's questions…' with '—%' score simultaneously. Minor UX observation.

issues: Blank content area while loading (no spinner/skeleton) creates visual gap between 'Mira's Go Picks for Mojo' header and the dimension cards section below it

tests_passed: Go page loads correctly at /go route - NoPetState shown when not logged in
GoHero displays correctly with pet photo, soul score 95%, breed badge
GoHero tab bar shows 3 tabs: '✈️ Go Essentials', '🏡 Find a Stay', '🗺️ Book a Service' with teal active underline
GoCategoryStrip renders 6 pills: Safety, Calming, Carriers, Feeding, Health & Docs, Stay & Board
ALL 6 category pills open GoContentModal (all tested: safety, calming, carriers, feeding, health, stay)
GoContentModal teal color scheme: dark gradient header (#0D3349), teal Mira quote box
GoContentModal shows Mira quote (e.g., 'These are the safety essentials I'd insist on for every trip with Mojo.')
GoContentModal shows filtered products: Safety shows 9 products for Mojo with '× chicken-free filtered' badge
GoContentModal sub-category tabs render (e.g., All | Safety)
'Find a Stay' tab click shows PetFriendlyStays component with 'Pet-Friendly Stays near Mojo' heading
PetFriendlyStays has 6 type filter pills: All, Hotels, Resorts, Homestays, Boarding, Camping
PetFriendlyStays shows location: 'Pet-friendly stays near Mojo in Goa'
PetFriendlyStays loads stays from Google Places API (working, shows skeleton → places)
TripProfile bar visible: 'Mojo's Trip Profile ✗ Chicken Mira's picks →'
TripProfile drawer opens on click: shows 'GROW MOJO'S TRIP PROFILE', close button (✕)
'Book a Service' tab shows Go Concierge services: Flight Coordination, Road & Train Travel, Boarding & Daycare, Pet Sitting, Relocation, Pet Taxi, Travel Planning, Emergency Travel
action_items: FIX: GoContentModal useEffect deps - change `allergies` to `pet?.id` to prevent re-fetch on every petData reference change. Line 313 in /app/frontend/src/components/go/GoContentModal.jsx: `}, [isOpen, category, allergies, size, condition, apiUrl]);` → `}, [isOpen, category, pet?.id, apiUrl]);` and compute allergies/size/condition inside the effect.

FIX: MiraPicksSection should show loading skeleton cards while claude-picks API is pending (loading=true). Currently shows blank space. Add 3-4 shimmer/skeleton cards when loading=true in GoSoulPage.jsx MiraPicksSection (~line 360).
INVESTIGATE: Backend `/api/places/pet-friendly-stays` returns 500 when breed=Indie param included without lat/lng. Check error handling in the places API route.
critical_code_review_comments: GoContentModal.jsx line 313: useEffect deps include `allergies` (array object) which creates a new reference every time `pet` prop reference changes. This causes the modal to reload products repeatedly during initial page load when GoSoulPage re-renders due to background AI scoring. Fix: Use `pet?.id` as dep and compute allergies inside effect.
MiraPicksSection (GoSoulPage.jsx ~line 360): No loading state UI - blank space shown while claude-picks API is in flight. Should add skeleton cards (3-4 cards) while loading=true.
PetFriendlyStays.jsx: The API call includes `breed=Indie` param which causes intermittent 500 on backend. Consider removing breed from the API call params or fixing backend to handle it gracefully.

success_rate.frontend: 80% (core features all work, 2 medium performance/loading issues)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 with Mojo as active pet (soul_score: 95%, breed: Indie, allergy: Chicken, city: Goa)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All GO pillar core features are implemented and working: GoCategoryStrip (6 pills), GoContentModal (opens correctly, shows products, teal scheme, allergy filtering), GoHero (3 tabs), Find a Stay (PetFriendlyStays with 6 filter pills), Book a Service (concierge services), TripProfile (compact bar + drawer). Two medium issues: (1) GoContentModal slow load due to deps instability, (2) MiraPicksSection blank space while loading. Test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. Pet: Mojo.

GoContentModal_slow_load.symptom: Modal shows loading spinner for 5-8 seconds after clicking category pill
GoContentModal_slow_load.root_cause: GoContentModal useEffect has `allergies` in deps array. `allergies = useMemo(() => getPetAllergies(pet), [pet])`. When GoSoulPage triggers background scoring (POST /api/mira/score-for-pet on mount), scoring completes and may update petData via soulScoreUpdated events. Each petData update creates new `pet` object reference → `allergies` useMemo recomputes to new array reference → useEffect re-runs → setLoading(true) → products cleared → new fetch starts. Cycle repeats until petData stabilizes.
GoContentModal_slow_load.fix: Change useEffect dependency from `allergies` to `pet?.id`. Compute allergies inside the effect body. This ensures the effect only re-runs when the actual pet changes, not on every re-render.

MiraPicksSection_blank.symptom: Mira's Go Picks section shows only header with blank content area for 14+ seconds
MiraPicksSection_blank.root_cause: MiraPicksSection uses Promise.all([claude-picks-products, claude-picks-services]). The claude-picks endpoint for products may trigger LiteLLM AI scoring calls that take 14+ seconds each. While loading=true, showImagines=false and picks=[], so the section renders an empty flex container with no visible content.
MiraPicksSection_blank.fix: Add loading skeleton in MiraPicksSection: show 3-4 shimmer placeholder cards while loading=true. Also consider adding a timeout (e.g., 5s) after which showImagines becomes true even if loading hasn't completed.
